text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
There they are... Looks like they're doing<n>well...
Perhaps I should get a little bit<n>closer.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
My oh my... Care to explain why you're<n>spying on
our underclassmen?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Don't be shy, I know you can do it. Just<n>go up to
them and ask to join 'em.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What?! I would never dare to meddle so<n>
obviously!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
This is... Yes, this is merely surveillance! I<n>must
confirm whether or not they are<n>studying!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Those two were rather worried about<n>their
upcoming test, so I naturally took<n>notice.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I refuse to have anyone in my entourage embarrass me with a failing grade.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty sure they'd like it better if you<n>called
them your "cute little juniors."

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...This is why no one calls you cute.
